summary: Senior engineer with 20+ years building and operating high-scale software systems with deep focus on observability, reliability, and performance. Hands-on experience creating telemetry pipelines, APM instrumentation, monitoring strategy, and operational tooling used by engineering teams. Strong foundation in distributed systems troubleshooting, cloud operations, and engineering craftsmanship.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built telemetry and observability data pipelines for 6,000+ endpoints, enabling engineers to detect issues early and reduce operational risk.
Designed runtime reporting and alert-focused workflows that improved reliability planning and cloud triage across enterprise services.
Partnered with engineering teams to define measurable service behaviors and improve incident response through data-driven insights.
Developed Python-based automation and analytics tooling to support uptime, forecasting, and platform optimization initiatives.

experience.title: Performance Engineer (Dynatrace)
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and synthetic monitoring for customer-facing applications and critical backend services.
Implemented dashboarding and end-to-end visibility patterns that improved troubleshooting speed and reliability outcomes.
Supported cloud migration and observability modernization efforts across AWS-hosted workloads.

experience.title: Senior Consultant (APM SME)
bullets: Led large-scale APM implementations and upgrades across complex environments with thousands of instrumented agents.
Created management modules, alerts, dashboards, and extraction tooling to improve system measurability and operational confidence.
Worked directly with engineering teams on performance diagnostics, root-cause analysis, and reliability improvements.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed JVM, memory, thread, and database behavior under load to identify bottlenecks and increase service stability.
Built repeatable performance analysis workflows and delivered actionable tuning recommendations to engineering teams.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Contributed to high-throughput platform modernization and migration initiatives with strong emphasis on performance and resilience.
Built validation/testing workflows supporting stable operations in distributed production environments.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Enterprise Telemetry Reliability Platform
projects.description: Built telemetry ingestion and analysis workflows used for proactive reliability planning and faster incident triage.

projects.name: Dynatrace Monitoring Modernization
projects.description: Expanded end-to-end observability and synthetic monitoring coverage for customer-facing systems and cloud workloads.
